title: UNODC homicide rate direction
description: Forecast whether a country's UNODC intentional homicide rate (per 100k) will be higher in a later year than at the as_of year.
question_template: As of {as_of_year}, will {target}'s UNODC homicide rate (per 100k) be higher in {resolution_year} than in {as_of_year}?
limitations: UNODC coverage is sparse and years vary by country. Resolution requires both baseline and holdout year rows to exist; missing years void the forecast. Not all MVP countries have recent homicide rate rows.
